title: LlamaPalooza
body:
Ever wished for a Llama to spit something useful at you? Your dream is now a reality with the LlamaPalooza mod! Introducing Loot Llamas, your new resource-generating companions that spit valuable items at configurable intervals.

By breeding them, you can upgrade the stats on your Llama, upgrading their Speed, Gain and Strength.

Every level of speed reduces the spit interval by 1 second by default, it can be configured in the config.

The config has the following options:

-   **tables** - A list of loot tables known to the mod.
-   **spitInterval** - The interval in ticks between spitting. By default, it's 200 ticks (10 seconds).
-   **speedReduction** - The amount of ticks reduced per speed level.

**By default Loot Llamas are unobtainable; it's up to Pack Developers to set up a way to obtain / spawn them.**
